properties.name: app.fine.per-day-rate
properties.description: Daily overdue fine amount used by fine calculations.

properties.name: app.reservation.pickup-window-hours
properties.description: How many hours a READY reservation remains available for pickup.

properties.name: app.maintenance.backup.dir
properties.description: Directory where the admin maintenance backup SQL file is stored.

properties.name: app.maintenance.backup.filename
properties.description: Single backup filename that is replaced on each maintenance run.

properties.name: app.maintenance.cleanup.paths
properties.description: Comma-separated list of temporary/cache directories to clean during admin maintenance.

properties.name: app.maintenance.temp.dir
properties.description: Legacy single temp directory option. Prefer app.maintenance.cleanup.paths.
